title: internal error on type localparam
body:
Using Verilator build from Git.

After thinking a bit about the code, while a type `parameter` makes sense, a type `localparam` does not. I should have just used `typedef`. So I would not say this is an issue with SystemVerilog functionality, but I did not check the standard for whether it is allowed. Instead I would say it is a crash where a parsing error would be desired.

```sh
%Error: Internal Error: ../../tb/pipeline/register_slice_backpressure_tb.sv:23:41: ../V3Ast.cpp:1100: Comparison of a node with dtypep() with a node without dtypep()
                                                                                 : ... note: In instance 'register_slice_backpressure_tb'
-node2=SUB 0x56a23db5b720 {bn11bk} @dt=0x56a23db19440@(G/swu32/4)
   23 |     localparam type DAT_T = logic [WIDTH-1:0];
      |                                         ^
                        ... See the manual at https://verilator.org/verilator_doc.html for more assistance.
```
